app_release_notes: v1.0.0 - Loadscope is out of beta. One-time purchase with lifetime updates: measure your target groups in-app, import your chronograph data, and Loadscope scores every load to call your best one. Thanks for being here early.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.0.0 - Loadscope is out of beta. One-time purchase with lifetime updates: measure your target groups in-app, import your chronograph data, and Loadscope scores every load to call your best one. Thanks for being here early.

windows.app_release_notes: v0.18.2 - The in-app User Manual and welcome tour now show measuring your target groups right in Loadscope. The app now always checks for updates on launch so you never miss one. Plus a clearer error report, startup hardening, and an up-to-date What's New list.
